name: okta_password_extraction_via_scim
description: Cleartext user passwords extracted via a SCIM app (application.lifecycle.update with outcome reason containing 'Pushing user passwords').

validation.notes: Base eventType application.lifecycle.update is present (177 over 90d); the 'Pushing user passwords' reason subset was not separately counted and is expected to be rare. okta.outcome.reason and the target display names are ingested, so the detection ports faithfully.
